title: AI Spy Thriller Poster
description: Turns a photo into a moody text-free spy thriller poster.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a text-free spy thriller poster image. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, pose, camera angle, and main framing. Add rain-slick streets or shadowy interiors, cool cinematic lighting, reflected city lights, tailored coat or suit styling where appropriate, suspenseful atmosphere, and crisp poster-grade realism without typography.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, weapons as the main focus, changed identity, extra people, distorted face, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, cartoon, comedy mood, low quality, blurry, cluttered background
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. rainy city spy thriller, cool neon reflections...
